raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find /var/log/* older than 1 day and tar.gz. Command: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1). Use -print0 and xargs? Simpler: tar czf logs.tar.gz -C /var/log $(find . -type f -mtime +1). But need full path. Use find and tar -T. tar czf logs.tar.gz -T <(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1). Provide one command.
